sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Energy Stocks Plummet As Iran Reopens Strait of Hormuz to Commercial Shipping
feed.summary: Energy stocks, including APA Corporation, plummeted after Iran reopened the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping, leading to a significant drop in oil prices. This event, coupled with a bearish forecast for global oil demand from the International Energy Agency, caused investors to shift from energy to growth-oriented sectors. Despite APA's strong financial performance in 2025, near-term earnings estimates are expected to decline due to falling oil prices and the removal of the geopolitical risk premium.

feed.title: [H.eco Tech Festa 2026] Sustainability now a condition for market access: HP exec
feed.summary: HP Inc. executive Kim Hye-sun states that sustainability has become a mandatory condition for market access and long-term competitiveness, rather than just a value or commitment. Kim emphasizes that delaying sustainability investments will result in higher costs through stricter regulations, supply chain instability, and increased operational expenses.

feed.title: Dr. Wang Daxue, CFO of Lotus Technology, confirmed his attendance at the ChainCatcher Hong Kong forum themed "Crypto 2026: From Cryptocurrency to Smart Economy."

He will speak on "Crypto Links to the Physical Industry, Smart Mobility on the Chain," exploring on-chain technology's application in smart mobility.
